text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released in late October 2010. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2010/625892.html The line was based on the Petit Eva: Evangelion@School series. There are 5 regular packages in the line that combined, makes the NERV Headquarters base that is approximately 125mm in height. The completed "NERV Base" can be transformed into an unfolded state using an original gimmick. https://www.bandai.co.jp/catalog/item.php?jan_cd=4543112625892000
